'''''Katana''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that served in the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Starfleet]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. It was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Katana fleet|the fleet that bore its name]].

==History==
Around [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]], it was lost with the rest of the fleet due to the outbreak of a [[hive virus]] that caused the crew of the Katana to go mad and jump to random hyperspace coordinates, along with the other 199 slaved ships. That fleet was called the ''Katana Fleet'' or, in the [[Rebellion era]], the ''Dark Force''.

Although the fleet was rediscovered [[9 ABY/Legends|fifty years later]], and the majority captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], the ''Katana'' herself was one of the 15 ships recovered by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During the [[Battle for the Katana fleet]], a team led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was able to use the ''Katana'' to destroy the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Peremptory]]'', by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] using its slave circuit controls to ram one of the other Dreadnaughts into the Star Destroyer. It was where they first discovered Thrawn's cloned troops.

==Behind the scenes==
''Katana'' was also the name of a Japanese server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
